projection_assumptions.note: Conservative estimate for mobile Tiger Lake AVX2; Intel documents 3+ Gbps on Xeon
projection_assumptions.post_match_overhead: Measured from current benchmarks: total_time - sum(regex_time). Stays constant since it is Go code (finding construction, confidence scoring, context extraction, classification)
projection_assumptions.mixed_content_density: ~2 sensitive items per KB of content

files.current_full_scan.csv: Full scan latency across content sizes (clean vs mixed)
files.current_matcher_categories.csv: Aggregate latency by matcher category at 100KB
files.projected_hyperscan.csv: Projected Hyperscan latency vs current, with speedup factor
files.projected_profiles.csv: Projected profile comparison at 100KB mixed content
